channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: U.S.-Israeli war with Iran spreads, as Iran's neighbors warn strikes won't "go unanswered" - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S.-Israeli war with Iran spreads, as Iran's neighbors warn strikes won't "go unanswered"  CBS News
  2. Iranian barrages test allied interceptor reserves as US sounds alarm for Americans in region  Fox News
  3. Nuclear program, missiles or regime change: Trump struggles to define Iran war goals  NBC News
  4. Trump won’t rule out sending US troops into Iran ‘if necessary’— tells Post war is progressing ‘way ahead of schedule’  New York Post
  5. Live Updates: Trump says Iran war could last weeks  PBS

item.title: Report: Israel hacked Tehran traffic cameras to track Khamenei ahead of assassination - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. Report: Israel hacked Tehran traffic cameras to track Khamenei ahead of assassination  The Times of Israel

  4. Can Trump Legally Kill Iran’s Leader?  The New York Times

item.title: Iran targets U.S. allies, hits American Embassy in Riyadh - Axios
item.description:
1. Iran targets U.S. allies, hits American Embassy in Riyadh  Axios
  2. Iran live news: US embassy in Riyadh hit; Israel seizes land in Lebanon  Al Jazeera
  3. US closes 2 embassies, reduces footprint in other countries in the region  CNN
  4. Live updates: U.S. shuts embassies in Saudi Arabia, Kuwait after drone attacks; Israeli troops stage incursion into Lebanon  NBC News
  5. Iran continues to hit back at US-Israeli strikes as Trump says it is too late to talk  The Guardian

item.title: Live: Loud explosions heard in Iran's capital as US, Israel launch new strikes - France 24
item.description: Live: Loud explosions heard in Iran's capital as US, Israel launch new strikes  France 24View Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: The U.S. shuts some Gulf embassies and warns of a prolonged war with Iran - NPR
item.description:

  4. US urges citizens to immediately leave over a dozen Middle East countries  Al Jazeera
  5. US orders evacuations across Middle East, halts operations at 2 embassies  The Hill

item.title: War with Iran strains the US-UK relationship as Starmer and Trump disagree - AP News
item.description:
1. War with Iran strains the US-UK relationship as Starmer and Trump disagree  AP News

  4. Keir Starmer has his ‘Love Actually’ moment and stands up to Donald Trump  Financial Times

item.title: IDF sends troops further into south Lebanon and strikes Beirut amid Hezbollah attacks - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. IDF sends troops further into south Lebanon and strikes Beirut amid Hezbollah attacks  The Times of Israel

  4. Israeli military deploys additional forces to southern Lebanon  Reuters
  5. Lebanon’s leaders turn on Hezbollah as airstrikes hit Beirut and thousands seek shelter  AP News

item.title: Trump's Asian allies fear Iran war will sap defences against China - Reuters
item.description:
1. Trump's Asian allies fear Iran war will sap defences against China  Reuters
  2. What China’s response to the US attack on Iran says about its foreign policy  AP News
  3. Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi  Reuters
  4. Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why  Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
  5. Trump’s show of force in the Middle East creates a weakness China can exploit  The Guardian

item.title: Pakistan says its forces killed 67 Afghan troops in cross-border clashes. Kabul rejects the claim - AP News

item.title: Iran’s targeting of airport, ports and hotels in reaction to US strikes has forced Gulf nations onto front lines of a war they want no part in - The Conversation
item.description:
1. Iran’s targeting of airport, ports and hotels in reaction to US strikes has forced Gulf nations onto front lines of a war they want no part in  The Conversation
  2. Gulf states on verge of acting against Iran over ‘reckless’ strikes across region  The Guardian

  4. Gulf states intercept hundreds of Iranian missiles and drones, issue joint condemnation with US  Fox News
  5. Why did Iran bomb Dubai? A Middle East expert explains the regional alliances at play  The Conversation

item.description:

item.title: World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war - PBS
item.description:
